---
title: "Informe dels cabals (PDF)"
author: Arnau Coronado Nadal
execute:
  cache: true
  cache-dir: _quarto_cache_pdf
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
---

## Punt de mesura STE-01

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-01:

### 20251204_141433_STE-01.csv (2025-12-04)

![](outputs/plots/20251204_141433_STE-01.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251205_044520_STE-01.csv (2025-12-05)

![](outputs/plots/20251205_044520_STE-01.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-02

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-02:

### 20251104_103620_STE-02.csv (2025-11-04)

![](outputs/plots/20251104_103620_STE-02.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251114_112101_STE-02.csv (2025-11-14)

![](outputs/plots/20251114_112101_STE-02.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251117_092425_STE-02.csv (2025-11-17)

![](outputs/plots/20251117_092425_STE-02.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-03

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-03:

### 20251027_143957_STE-03.csv (2025-10-27)

![](outputs/plots/20251027_143957_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251028_110853_STE-03.csv (2025-10-28)

![](outputs/plots/20251028_110853_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251103_125239_STE-03.csv (2025-11-03)

![](outputs/plots/20251103_125239_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251110_095343_STE-03.csv (2025-11-10)

![](outputs/plots/20251110_095343_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251111_110949_STE-03.csv (2025-11-11)

![](outputs/plots/20251111_110949_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251112_114717_STE-03.csv (2025-11-12)

![](outputs/plots/20251112_114717_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251112_122634_STE-03.csv (2025-11-12)

![](outputs/plots/20251112_122634_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251122_003137_STE-03.csv (2025-11-22)

![](outputs/plots/20251122_003137_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251126_141746_STE-03.csv (2025-11-26)

![](outputs/plots/20251126_141746_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251127_132919_STE-03.csv (2025-11-27)

![](outputs/plots/20251127_132919_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251127_133004_STE-03.csv (2025-11-27)

![](outputs/plots/20251127_133004_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251201_155248_STE-03.csv (2025-12-01)

![](outputs/plots/20251201_155248_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260205_131455_STE-03.csv (2026-02-05)

![](outputs/plots/20260205_131455_STE-03.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-04

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-04:

### 20251007_100341_STE-04.csv (2025-10-07)

![](outputs/plots/20251007_100341_STE-04.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251008_095114_STE-04.csv (2025-10-08)

![](outputs/plots/20251008_095114_STE-04.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251008_115126_STE-04.csv (2025-10-08)

![](outputs/plots/20251008_115126_STE-04.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251112_130310_STE-04.csv (2025-11-12)

![](outputs/plots/20251112_130310_STE-04.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-05

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-05:

### 20260316_085832_STE-05.csv (2026-03-16)

![](outputs/plots/20260316_085832_STE-05.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260316_134917_STE-05.csv (2026-03-16)

![](outputs/plots/20260316_134917_STE-05.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-07

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-07:

### 20260219_112332_STE-07.csv (2026-02-19)

![](outputs/plots/20260219_112332_STE-07.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260219_144829_STE-07.csv (2026-02-19)

![](outputs/plots/20260219_144829_STE-07.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260223_075303_STE-07.csv (2026-02-23)

![](outputs/plots/20260223_075303_STE-07.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260224_134917_STE-07.csv (2026-02-24)

![](outputs/plots/20260224_134917_STE-07.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260225_140608_STE-07.csv (2026-02-25)

![](outputs/plots/20260225_140608_STE-07.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-08

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-08:

### 20251118_024904_STE-08.csv (2025-11-18)

![](outputs/plots/20251118_024904_STE-08.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260309_103006_STE-08.csv (2026-03-09)

![](outputs/plots/20260309_103006_STE-08.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20260309_133323_STE-08.csv (2026-03-09)

![](outputs/plots/20260309_133323_STE-08.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-10

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-10:

### 20251119_112337_STE-10.csv (2025-11-19)

![](outputs/plots/20251119_112337_STE-10.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251120_092331_STE-10.csv (2025-11-20)

![](outputs/plots/20251120_092331_STE-10.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

### 20251120_093239_STE-10.csv (2025-11-20)

![](outputs/plots/20251120_093239_STE-10.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }

## Punt de mesura STE-11

Gràfiques de les mesures fetes en el punt STE-11:

### 20251121_025609_STE-11.csv (2025-11-21)

![](outputs/plots/20251121_025609_STE-11.csv_A_Flow_velocity_m-s.png){ width=80% }
